channel.title: David Rolfe — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: David Rolfe: ADDED TSM (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) added TSM in Q4 2025 · 9.1% of portfolio. Building Taiwan Semi — AI picks and shovels.

item.title: David Rolfe: ADDED FICO (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) added FICO in Q4 2025 · 5.9% of portfolio. Adding to credit scoring monopoly.

item.title: David Rolfe: TRIMMED AAPL (-5%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) trimmed AAPL in Q4 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. Small 19-year Apple trim.

item.title: David Rolfe: TRIMMED GOOGL (-21%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) trimmed GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q4 2025 · 9.9% of portfolio.

item.title: David Rolfe: ADDED CDW (+26%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) added CDW (CDW CORP) in Q4 2025 · 4.0% of portfolio.

item.title: David Rolfe: NEW POSITION CB (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) new position CB (CHUBB LIMITED) in Q4 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio.

item.title: David Rolfe: NEW POSITION AMZN (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) new position AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 2.6% of portfolio.

item.title: David Rolfe: TRIMMED PYPL (-55%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) trimmed PYPL (PAYPAL HLDGS INC) in Q4 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio.

item.title: David Rolfe: NEW POSITION IVV (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) new position IVV (ISHARES TR) in Q4 2025 · 1.1% of portfolio.

item.title: David Rolfe: EXITED POOL (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) exited POOL (POOL CORP) in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: David Rolfe: ADDED TSM (+22%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) added TSM in Q3 2025 · 7.7% of portfolio. Building TSM position.

item.title: David Rolfe: ADDED BRK.B (+6%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) added BRK.B in Q3 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio. Adding Berkshire.
